row2_auxiliary_summary.ego_motion_trend: Forward motion along a straight road with slight curvature to the right.
row2_auxiliary_summary.main_object_trajectory_trend: Pedestrians crossing from left to right; vehicles parked or moving slowly in adjacent lanes.

semantic.scene_summary: Urban street scene with multi-lane road, crosswalks, modern buildings, and active pedestrian/vehicle traffic.
semantic.visibility_notes: All elements clearly visible under daylight conditions. No occlusions obscure critical objects.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Smooth temporal progression. Pedestrians move continuously across crosswalk. Vehicle movement is steady without abrupt changes.
logical.object_continuity: Objects remain consistently present and identifiable throughout frames. No sudden appearances or disappearances.
logical.structure_continuity: Road geometry, building positions, and environmental features maintain spatial coherence over time.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle proceeds forward at moderate speed, maintaining lane position.
decision.risk_context: Low-risk scenario. Crosswalk activity requires attention but no immediate hazard detected. Clear visibility supports safe navigation.

semantic.scene_summary: Similar urban street layout with crosswalks, buildings, and vehicles. Some structural details appear less defined than Row 1.
semantic.visibility_notes: Overall scene recognizable but with reduced texture fidelity. Some objects show minor morphing or softening of edges.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Temporal flow generally smooth. Minor flickering observed in pedestrian limbs and vehicle contours. Trajectories follow expected paths but with slight jitter.
logical.object_continuity: Most objects persist across frames. Occasional blending or ghosting effects on moving pedestrians and distant vehicles.
logical.structure_continuity: Global scene structure preserved. Local inconsistencies in edge definition and surface continuity, particularly around complex geometries like building corners and road curbs.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle continues forward steadily, mirroring Row 1 behavior.
decision.risk_context: No clear emergency maneuver required. Reduced visual clarity may impair precise object tracking for downstream systems, though no immediate collision risk is evident.
